prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image features a person riding on top of a skateboard down a wooden path or boardwalk. They are skillfully balancing themselves while performing this action. There is another smaller figure located towards the right side of the frame, but it appears to be unrelated to the primary focus of the scene.

The skateboarder's feet can be seen clearly positioned on the skateboard as they ride along the path. The surrounding environment consists mainly of grassy areas with some dirt patches, creating an outdoor recreational atmosphere.
